title: hieracium lachenalii subsp. lepidiceps
intro: Hieracium lachenalii subsp. lepidiceps is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae), commonly known as a hawkweed. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Hieracium lachenalii subsp. lepidiceps is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in folk medicine to treat skin conditions and digestive issues.
